journeys.name: Hold Locked And Deferred Journey Boundaries
journeys.overclaimRisk: Viewer may assume all known journeys are executable.
journeys.caveat: Only active Wave 0-2 journeys are executable; hold-locked and deferred journeys are displayed as boundaries.
journeys.captionShort: Hold and deferred journeys stay visible without being executed.
journeys.captionLong: The Journey Spine shows what is active, hold-locked and deferred so the demo does not silently overclaim scope.
presenterNotes: Use this to explain scope discipline before showing active journeys.
journeys.endState: Hold-locked and deferred journeys remain visible as blocked boundaries.
preconditions: Demo auth session is active
Wave 0-2 source lock is loaded
visibilityRules: Deferred journeys are not promoted by screencast demand
evidenceExpectations: Hold lock is visible in the Journey Spine
auditExpectations: No mutation is claimed for hold-locked journeys
riskNotes: Do not present hold-locked journeys as current implementation.

steps.title: Inspect hold-locked and deferred boundaries
steps.action: Inspect visible journey boundaries
steps.caption: The dashboard keeps blocked and deferred journeys visible without turning them into demo claims.
steps.expectedStateChange: No journey mutation occurs; the screencast proves scope boundaries only.
steps.clientVisibility: No client visibility change
steps.evidence: Source lock boundary only
steps.audit: No audit completion claimed
steps.qaAssertion: Hold panel renders source-locked journeys without executable controls.
